ciffc.note: Off-season. National fire statistics will be updated when the 2026 fire season begins.

news.title: N.S. crews continue battling out-of-control wildfire northeast of Halifax
news.description: Two fixed-wing water bombers from Newfoundland and Labrador are responding alongside two of Nova Scotia's helicopters and four of the province's fixed-wing water bombers.

news.title: Trump threatens new Canada tariffs over fires sending 'filthy' air into US cities
news.description: Canadian leader Mark Carney says both the US and Canada have an equal responsibility to fight climate change, which experts say are worsening wildfire conditions.

news.title: Orange haze from Canada wildfires seen in Ontario and northern US
news.description: There are currently 838 wildfires actively burning across the country, according to the Canadian Interagency Forest Fire Centre.

news.title: Open fire and campfire bans coming into effect in B.C. amid dry lightning threat
news.description: Several open fire bans, including campfire prohibitions, are coming into effect over the next two days in parts of British Columbia as crews prepare for the threat of new blazes.

news.title: Toronto's skies turn orange as wildfire smoke settles in
news.description: Toronto's skies turned orange Wednesday due to smoke from forest fires in northwestern Ontario that plummeted the city's air quality to among the worst in the world.

news.title: Wildfire season is not as perilous as last year: officials
Some structures lost at resort due to Fraser Canyon fires
Out-of-control wildfire forces evacuation in B.C.'s Fraser Canyon
